author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Hunting Simulator 3 | SimFauna Explanation
Discover SimFauna, our advanced ecosystem simulation system that brings wildlife to life with realistic behaviors, life cycles, genetics, and dynamic predator-prey interactions.

Learn how your hunting decisions influence animal populations and shape future generations, creating a deeper and more immersive hunting experience.

This is just the beginning, stay tuned for more behind the scenes looks at Hunting Simulator 3 in the coming months.

Coming this Fall on Xbox X|S. Wishlist now!

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/hunting-simulator-3/9ncm50rp62pr

text:
Terra Invicta - Dark Skies - Announcement Trailer
The first expansion for Terra Invicta, Dark Skies is coming to XBOX on PC on July 27th!

Face the alien invasion in two new scenarios for Terra Invicta. Drop into a world shattered by nuclear fire a century ago, or rewind to 2003 and trade the rush to the stars for a slower fight on Earth.

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Guns of Eschaton | Soulslike FPS Western | Announce Trailer
Guns of Eschaton is a soulslike FPS set in an occult Wild West created by the late, renowned writer and worldbuilder Viktor Antonov (Half-Life 2, Dishonoured, Prey, Fallout 4, Wolfenstein: The New Order). 

Here history burns, legends bleed, and every gunfight feels personal. This is not a fast-paced shooter where victory comes through reflexes alone. Every bullet matters. Every decision has consequences. Solo or in co-op, gunslinger, go West and die with the country.

Coming to XBOX Series X|S. Wishlist today
https://www.microsoft.com/store/productid/9nc7z1z6hw8r
